case_title: CHINATOWN COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CENTER vs. ALLEN, LARRY et al

docket_entries.description: MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHINATOWN COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CENTER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUL-26-1999 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 606 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON AUG-02-1999 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 606 JUDGE PRO TEM: IRVING PFEFFER CLERK: M.MELVIN REPORTER: L.GRANGER SETTLEMENT REACHED BY THE PARTIES AND STATED FOR THE RECORD: PLAINTIFF TO HAVE JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT FOR POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 385 EDDY STREET, #211, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA. DEF. TO VACATE THE PREMISES NO LATER THAN MIDNIGHT 8/10/99; WRIT STAYED TO 8/10/99. SECURITY DEP. RETAINED BY PLTF; RENTAL AGREEMENT IS FORFEITED/VOID. TRIAL DATE OF 8/2/99 IS VACATED.
